Property.Description: Microsoft Hyper-V is active. Some results may not reflect real hardware !

Property.Entry: CPU Power Limit 1 (Long Duration)/Processor Base Power (PBP)
CPU Power Limit 2 (Short Duration)/Maximum Turbo Power (MTP)

Property.Description: Instruction: 12 x 32 KBytes, Data: 12 x 48 KBytes

Property.Entry: FPU Data Pointer updated only on x87 Exceptions
Deprecated FPU CS and FPU DS
AVX-512 4 x Vector Neural Network Instructions Word Variable Precision
AVX-512 4 x Fused Multiply Accumulation Packed Single Precision
Indirect Branch Restricted Speculation (IBRS), Indirect Branch Predictor Barrier (IBPB)
Control-Flow Enforcement Technology (CET) Indirect Branch Tracking
Not Exhibiting MXCSR Configuration Dependent Timing (MCDT)
MCE on modifying code page size without TLB invalidation
Shared Buffers Data Read (SBDR), Sideband Stale Data Propagator (SSDP) Vulnerability
Fill Buffer Stale Data Propagator (FBSDP) Vulnerability
Post-barrier Return Stack Buffer Predictions Vulnerability
L1D Flush on VM Entry Not Needed
System Agent Power Management (SAPM) Dynamic Load Line (DLL)
Near Memory Caching for Persistent Memory
Near Memory Caching for Far Memory
SXP MC Channel Mirroring Mode Capability
DDR4 MC Channel Mirroring Mode Capability
